title: sql-steward semantic layer
description: The contract between an AI agent and your database. The agent can read what is described here and nothing else.

dialect.description: The SQL dialect queries are compiled for.

entities.description: The tables the agent may read, each described as a logical entity.

joins.description: The only relationships the agent may traverse. A join not listed here is refused, not invented.

metrics.description: Pre-approved aggregates. The agent picks dimensions and filters from the allow-lists; it cannot change the aggregation.

checks.description: Declared data-quality assertions. Each compiles to a violation count; the agent runs them but cannot invent new ones.

policy.description: What the layer refuses, enforced at the tool boundary before any SQL is compiled.

block_pii.description: PII categories refused before a query runs. Any field tagged with one of these is unreadable.

max_rows.description: Hard ceiling on rows any single query may return.

table.description: The physical table name this entity maps to.

primary_key.description: The primary key column, used for row identity.

description.description: What this entity is. The agent reads this to understand the data.

fields.description: The columns the agent may reference. A column not listed here is invisible.

pii.description: Tag this column as personal data of the given category. If the category is in policy.block_pii, the column cannot be read.

search.description: Enables semantic_search() over this entity (PostgreSQL + pgvector only).

vector_column.description: The pgvector column holding the embeddings.

returns.description: Columns returned by a search. The embedding itself is never returned.

left.description: The entity on the left of the join.

right.description: The entity on the right of the join.

on.description: The join condition over logical entity names, e.g. "subscriptions.customer_id = customers.id".

entity.description: The entity this metric aggregates over.

aggregate.description: The aggregation. Fixed in the layer; the agent cannot change it.

field.description: The column aggregated. Use "*" for count.

dimensions_allowed.description: Columns the agent may group by. Optionally "entity.field" across a declared join.

filters_allowed.description: Columns the agent may filter on. Optionally "entity.field" across a declared join.

entity.description: The entity this check runs against.

field.description: The column checked. Required for all kinds except row_count_min.

min.description: Lower bound (range), or minimum row count (row_count_min).

max.description: Upper bound for the range kind.

values.description: The allowed set for the accepted_values kind.

severity.description: Whether a violation fails or only warns.

piiCategory.description: A PII category. sql-steward uses Presidio-style names; these are the common ones, but any recognizer name your pii-veil install knows is valid.
